title: Untitled
content: ICT Course on Wireless & Mobile Communication ICT Course on "Wireless & Mobile Communication" from 30th October, 2017 to 3rd November, 2017 A ICT Course on "Wireless & Mobile Communication" from 30th October, 2017 to 3rd November, 2017 is going to be conducted at JUIT, Waknaghat by NITTTR, Chandigarh and Department of Computer Science and Engineering and Information Technology, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat-173234. On completion of one week Program certificate of participation will be issued by NITTTR, Chandigarh to the participants. Registration Form
